text:
is a parody mini-series of four-image skits by hounori based on the Attack on Titan manga. It began publication in both Japanese and English on Kodansha and DeNA's manga app Manga Box on December 4, 2013, and ran until December 31, 2014.

On October 10, 2015 at New York Comic Con, Kodansha Comics USA announced its license to the series. Volume 1 was released on September 13, 2016, and Volume 2 on December 13, 2016.

Plot

Both volumes of Spoof on Titan lack an overall cohesive storyline. Each chapter is an individual skit, no chapter references a different chapter. The chapters are not in chronological order. While non-Canon, the majority of the Chapters don't break existing lore of the manga. The other chapters focus on alternate universes or timelines.

Volume 2 has a higher number of Attack on Titan characters that appear as spoof versions of themselves. While Volume 2's cover art implies that it focuses primarily on the events of the anime adaption of Attack on Titan's Season 2, both volumes have references to events that take place in Season 1 and Season 2.
